text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 61 

PHYS_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Part B Physician Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of coinsurance and deductible payments for the Part B physician office services 
(PHYS) for a given year. The total Beneficiary payments are calculated as the sum of 
LINE_COINSRNC_AMT + LINE_BENE_PTB_DDCTBL_AMT for the relevant lines. 

Physician office claims are a subset of
